general_provisions: This bill addresses requirements related to the sale of a carbon credit.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines and modifies terms;<hr><ltbullet>creates the Carbon Credit Litigation Fund and specifies the purpose of the fund;<hr><ltbullet>establishes reporting requirements for a state entity that sells or exchanges a carbon credit;<hr><ltbullet>requires the state auditor to report on the sale of carbon credits by state entities to the Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environmental Quality Appropriations Subcommittee; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
last_action: House/ signed by Speaker/ sent for enrolling
last_action_owner: Legislative Research and General Counsel / Enrolling
